claim_bullets.bullet_text: 53 Another history lesson. In 'Ye Olde Days,' JavaScript could not gather parameters. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.90-91)
A right-variadic function has one or more fixed arguments, and the rest are gathered into the rightmost argument. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.90-91)
In ECMAScript-5, a rightVariadic decorator was used to gather arguments into the last declared parameter. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.90-91)

source_record_text: In 'Ye Olde Days,' 53 JavaScript could not gather parameters, and we had to either do backflips with arguments and .slice , or we wrote ourselves a variadic decorator that could gather arguments into the last declared parameter.
